question: The chart shows the distribution of energy use by source. Based on this data, which of the following conclusions can be made?

options.A: Fossil Fuels account for more energy use than all the other sources combined.
options.B: Nuclear energy accounts for a larger share than Hydroelectric power.
options.C: Hydroelectric power accounts for a larger share than the combined share of Nuclear and Other sources.
options.D: Hydroelectric power has a larger share than Renewables.

explanation: This pie chart uses dual encoding: slice angle represents percentage, and the radius also varies with percentage, so slice area differences are exaggerated. That can make the largest category look overly dominant. Fossil Fuels: 35%; Hydroelectric: 25%; Nuclear: 20%; Other: 10%; Renewables: 10%.
